query: SELECT id, nome, status, progresso, updatedAt, NOW() as now_time, TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, updatedAt, NOW()) as segundos_desde_update FROM arquivos WHERE nome LIKE '%demonstrativo%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 1
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xKWvZvidGuv3Qt.root --database 98MRdVE9Uf2ZRMz25bPSye --execute SELECT id, nome, status, progresso, updatedAt, NOW() as now_time, TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, updatedAt, NOW()) as segundos_desde_update FROM arquivos WHERE nome LIKE '%demonstrativo%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 1
